steps.title: Read the prism dimensions
steps.content: The figure gives the prism dimensions as $6$ centimeters, $2$ centimeters, and $3$ centimeters.

steps.title: Apply the volume formula
steps.content:
Use the prism volume formula:
$$V=6\cdot 2\cdot 3=36$$
The volume is $36$ cubic centimeters. The answer is A.
